description: Track 2: The Cashier POS HUD ("Zero-Latency Interface") Focus: Perfecting the high-speed, high-contrast, keyboard-first point of sale. * Route: /pos * Tabs/Views: Speed Grid (Predictive search), Split-Checkout Terminal. * Showcase Elements: "Autonomous Void" 60-second visual timer, Live Fonepay QR polling, and the "Sync Pulse" offline/online visual indicator.
